# RIID-4573: Workdir Policy

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/migrationdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to macos-provider-cli-review](../macos-provider-cli-review.md)

This slice absorbs public workdir questions `Q-WS-001` through `Q-WS-006` into workspace, native-config, and runtime-upgrade SSOT.

## Resolved Defaults

- Local archive defaults to keep-in-place.
- Cleanup is disabled by default; only the opt-in TTL env path is active.
- There is no implicit size-based or task-count-based cleanup.
- Shared repo cache prune is operator-triggered only and guarded by short `repo_cache_update.lock`.
- Native config is task-scoped; user-global copy/overlay is not a default.

Container or VM handoff remains future C4 runtime launcher/platform adapter work. C6 prepares host-side files and manifests only.
